# AI Study-to-Work Coach Strategic Brief

Version: `1.0.0`
Category: USAII Global AI Hackathon 2026 / student_partner_track
Deadline: 2026-06-21 23:59 ET
Production readiness: 100%

## Winning Thesis

AI Study-to-Work Coach should be judged by its ability to turn opportunity rules into running workflows, traceable evidence, and submission-ready artifacts.

## Proof Priorities

- show the product operating end to end;
- make AI decisions inspectable through generated artifacts;
- tie every claim to an evidence slot;
- keep external submission automation receipt-backed;
- remove private applicant data from public artifacts.

## Strongest Evidence


## Competitive Frame

Position against manual operations and generic AI tooling by emphasizing domain-specific rules, evidence boundaries, and automation receipts.

## Closing Line

AI Study-to-Work Coach turns deadline pressure into a repeatable AI operations workflow with checklists, evidence, payloads, and receipts.

- Eligible student team members: 0/2 (student_partner_required).
- Qualifier rehearsal: 1/1 (ready).
- Demo MVP: 1/1 (done).
- Submission automation playbooks: 2/2 (ready_for_authorized_session).
